channel.title: How To Live Your Autonomous Life
channel.description: Weekly conversations between Noah and Ellis about autonomy, conscious choice, and living the life you actually want.
channel.ns0:author: FlamingoTales
channel.ns0:keywords: autonomy, conscious choice, personal development, self-directed living, life design, decision-making

item.title: Did You Choose This?
item.description:
Noah and Ellis explore a fundamental question: How much of your life did you actually choose? They discuss the difference between making choices and choosing the framework those choices live in — the menu vs restaurant problem. Ellis shares her journey from following a default path to consciously questioning and redesigning her life. A conversation about autonomy, defaults, and what it really means to choose.
**Key moments:** • Opening: The question that started it all (0:00) • Meet Ellis: How this conversation began (1:30) • The menu vs restaurant problem (3:00) • Why understanding your options matters (5:00) • Making your life actually yours: conscious choice vs default (7:00)
**Full transcript:** https://github.com/FlamingoTales/how-to-live-your-autonomous-life/blob/main/episodes/S01E01_did-you-choose-this/script.md
item.ns1:encoded: [Noah] This was How To Live Your Autonomous Life. See you next week.
item.ns0:title: Did You Choose This?
item.ns0:summary: Noah and Ellis explore a fundamental question: How much of your life did you actually choose? They discuss the difference between making choices and choosing the framework those choices live in — the menu vs restaurant problem. Ellis shares her journey from following a default path to consciously questioning and redesigning her life. A conversation about autonomy, defaults, and what it really means to choose.
item.ns0:keywords: autonomy, choice, conscious living, defaults, decision-making, personal agency, self-directed life, financial independence
